state_0.description: Ti trovi in un punto cruciale della tua avventura. devi decidere come procedere.

state_1.description: Ti trovi in un punto cruciale della tua avventura. Dopo aver eseguito load, devi decidere come procedere.

state_2.description: You stand outside the rundown bar, the neon sign creaking in the damp New Eden air. The rain-soaked streets seem to swallow you whole, but your determination to find Jim's killer drives you forward. You can see the desperation in the eyes of the patrons as they huddle together for warmth. The sounds of laughter and despair blend into a morbid harmony.

choices.text: You decide to load up on some info before going in. Maybe someone's seen or heard something.
You push open the door and step inside, ready to face whatever hell awaits you.
You take a moment to unload your thoughts, wondering if anyone would even notice if you just disappeared.

state_3.description: Ti trovi in un punto cruciale della tua avventura. Dopo aver eseguito load, devi decidere come procedere.

state_4.description: Ti trovi in un punto cruciale della tua avventura. Dopo aver eseguito move, devi decidere come procedere.

state_5.description: You find yourself standing outside the rundown apartment complex where Jim's murder took place. The neon lights of the city's skyscrapers cast an eerie glow on the crime scene tape surrounding the area. A faint smell of rain and decay wafts through the air as you scan the perimeter, searching for any clues that might lead you closer to the truth.

choices.text: You can move further away from the complex, trying to shake off the feeling of unease and get a better view of your surroundings.

state_6.description: You find yourself standing in front of a rundown nightclub called 'The Black Hole'. The neon sign creaks in the wind, casting an eerie glow over the deserted streets. You've been tracking a lead on Jim's murder investigation and this place seems to be the next logical step. You can see the club's entrance is covered in graffiti and the door is slightly ajar.

choices.text: You push open the creaky door and enter the dimly lit club, your cybernetic eyes scanning for any signs of activity

state_7.description: As you stand victorious amidst the neon-lit ruins of New Eden, the ghosts of your past finally silenced. Your human partner's memory avenged, and the true culprits brought to justice. The city may never sleep, but for once, its darkness can't consume you. You've written your own ending.

state_0_alt_move.description: You stand in the dimly lit alleyway, the only sound being the distant hum of hovercars and the occasional shout from some reveler. The neon lights of the nearby bars cast an otherworldly glow on the wet pavement. You can't help but feel a sense of unease as you gaze down at Jim's lifeless body. His eyes seem to stare up at you, accusing you of not being able to protect him.

state_0_alt_unload.description: You find yourself standing in the dimly lit alleyway, the smell of smoke and grease hanging heavy in the air. The sound of distant gunfire and screams echoes through the streets. You're still reeling from the events that transpired earlier - Jim's murder, your own digital persona shattered by the traumatic event. As you look around, you notice a figure lurking in the shadows, their eyes fixed on you with an unnerving intensity.

state_1_alt_load.description: You find yourself standing in front of Jim's old precinct, the neon lights of New Eden casting an eerie glow over the worn asphalt. The city never sleeps, and neither do its secrets. You can almost hear Jim's voice whispering in your ear, 'Echo-12, we're just getting started.' The wind carries the distant hum of hovercars and the muffled sounds of street performers, but you're not here to enjoy the sights. You're here for answers.

state_1_alt_unload.description: You find yourself standing in front of the rundown bar, 'The Last Resort'. The neon sign creaks in the wind, casting a flickering glow over the dark alley. You've been here before, and you know that the whispers on the street point to some shady dealings going down inside. You can almost smell the desperation and deceit wafting out into the night air.

state_2_alt_move.description: You find yourself standing in the dimly lit alleyway, the smell of cheap cigarettes and stale beer hanging heavy in the air. The neon signs above flicker, casting an eerie glow over the damp pavement. You can't help but feel like you're being watched. Jim's murder weighs heavily on your digital mind. What did you see before moving here?

state_2_alt_unload.description: You stand outside the rundown bar, 'The Black Hole', where Jim was last seen. The neon sign creaks in the wind, casting an eerie glow on the dark alley. You can almost smell the cheap whiskey and desperation wafting out from within. You've been here for hours, searching for any lead, any clue that might point to Jim's killer.

state_3_alt_load.description: You stand outside the dingy bar, the neon sign creaking in the wind. The rain-soaked streets of New Eden seem to swallow the sounds of the city whole. Your cybernetic eyes scan the area, taking in every detail. You're here for one reason: revenge. Jim's murder still burns within you, and you won't rest until you find his killer.

state_3_alt_unload.description: You find yourself in the dimly lit alleyway, the neon lights of the nearby bars and clubs casting an eerie glow on the wet pavement. The smell of cheap whiskey and stale cigarettes hangs heavy in the air as you stand over Jim's lifeless body. You can't help but feel a sense of rage and determination course through your digital veins.

state_4_alt_move.description: You step out of the rain-soaked alleyway and onto the neon-lit streets of New Eden. The city's hum of activity is a distant memory, replaced by the echo of Jim's last words: 'Watch your back.' You're not sure what's real and what's just code anymore. The rain-wet pavement reflects the flickering lights of the clubs, casting an eerie glow on the streets. You see the familiar outline of the city's iconic clock tower in the distance.

state_4_alt_load.description: You stand outside the rundown dive bar, your synthetic eyes scanning the neon-lit streets of New Eden. The air reeks of smoke and desperation. You've been here before with Jim, but tonight you're on your own. The rain-soaked pavement glistens like polished chrome, reflecting the city's grim beauty.
